LanguageData.CompRTSolarFlareShield_FlareProtection: Protects entire colony against solar flares.
LanguageData.RT_Setting_IdlePowerDraw_Tooltip: How much power the shield consumes when it is ON but no solar flare is active.\nLower values make the shield cheaper to keep ready.\nDefault: 50 W
LanguageData.RT_Setting_ActivePowerDraw_Tooltip: How much power the shield consumes when protecting the colony from an EMP/solar flare.\nHigher values make the shield more expensive to operate but it already protects against total blackout.\nDefault: 25000 W
LanguageData.RT_Setting_HeatPerTick_Tooltip:
How much heat the shield generates per tick while active.
Higher values cause more temperature rise in the room, requiring cooling.
Set to 0 to disable heat generation entirely.
Default: 0.5
LanguageData.RT_Setting_RotatorSpeedActive_Tooltip: Rotation speed of the shield's visual effect when active.\nPurely visual, does not affect gameplay.\nDefault: 20
LanguageData.RT_Setting_RotatorSpeedIdle_Tooltip: Rotation speed of the shield's visual effect when idle (no flare).\nPurely visual, does not affect gameplay.\nDefault: 0.5
